content:
Hi, I started playing today and after reading some guides I found that I struggled to keep all the information <:cry1:1356053046374961212> so I was hoping maybe I could receive further guidance! 

These are my current characters (I only got one kathi and one ghelot.) I've been using kathi + caocus + sanga + tulu as my main team for clearing the story. Are there any other combinations you'd consider viable or preferable? Thanks in advance <:ryker_pray:1468258632205340820>
